title: Promote 40% initial position cap
hypothesis: The accepted 50% day-2 add-on may make the old 25% initial cap too front-loaded. Lowering only the initial fill cap could reserve capacity for confirmed follow-through winners; raising it tests whether the stack is under-allocated at entry.
owner_notes: Accepted after three-window Gate 4. Focus next monitoring on concentration and drawdown.
next_actions: Do not repeat nearby initial-position-cap sweeps around 30-40% without forward concentration evidence.
Monitor whether the higher initial cap increases live drawdown or single-name concentration beyond the fixed-window tradeoff.
Do not combine this with add-on cap/fraction changes unless each branch has separate evidence.
